LeBron James Breaks 5 NBA Records at Age 41

Dec 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

LeBron James Breaks 5 NBA Records at Age 41

Basketball icon LeBron James has once again etched his name into the history books by breaking five major NBA records at the age of 41 during his remarkable 23rd season in the league.

Despite his age, LeBron continues to perform at an elite level, showcasing the longevity, consistency, and dominance that have defined his legendary career.

Key Points

  • LeBron James breaks five significant NBA records
  • Achieved during his historic 23rd NBA season
  • Continues elite performance at age 41
  • Reinforces his legacy as one of basketball’s greatest players
  • Demonstrates unmatched longevity in professional sports
